note: Splits the without_skill condition by whether the agent's transcript touched /spyglass/src/ (Read, Bash, Glob, LS, Grep) or WebFetched the Spyglass GitHub. Tests whether the skill's lift reduces to 'agent has source access' — if bs_source_touched approaches with_skill, the skill is doing source delivery; if not, the skill adds routing/workflow value beyond source access.
